content.text: For Volunteers' Week 2026, we're hearing from Carol, a magistrate for over 22 years and a true testament to what volunteering means. After losing most of her sight in 2012, Carol could have stepped away. Instead, she adapted, continuing to serve her community with the same dedication as ever.
For the full interview, visit our YouTube channel.
Listen to the latest episode now, available wherever you get your podcasts from!
A transcript of the podcast is also available.
